universities.name: United Arab Emirates University
universities.description: The first and oldest comprehensive national university in the UAE.

universities.name: New York University Abu Dhabi
universities.description: A highly selective liberal arts and science college in the Middle East.

universities.name: American University of Sharjah
universities.description: An independent, non-profit, coeducational institution of higher education.

universities.name: Khalifa University
universities.description: A world-class research university focusing on science, technology, and engineering.

universities.name: Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Dubai
universities.description: A top-ranked Indian private university branch offering world-class programs in engineering, biotechnology, and business studies in Dubai.

universities.name: BITS Pilani, Dubai Campus
universities.description: The international branch campus of the premier Birla Institute of Technology and Science, specializing in high-caliber engineering, technology, and computer science degrees.

universities.name: IIT Delhi - Abu Dhabi
universities.description: The highly prestigious first international branch of the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi, offering rigorous computational engineering, AI, and energy engineering degrees.

universities.name: Heriot-Watt University Dubai
universities.description: The first British university branch in Dubai, providing gold-standard UK degrees in mechanical engineering, petroleum science, and business management.

universities.name: University of Birmingham Dubai
universities.description: A prestigious Russell Group member with a smart-designed campus in Dubai, offering elite UK degree pathways in computer science, business management, and education.

universities.name: Zayed University
universities.description: A prominent federal university in the UAE with campus facilities across Dubai and Abu Dhabi, preparing global-ready students in humanities, communication, and business.

universities.name: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
universities.description: An elite, graduate-level research university that consistently ranks as the absolute top institution in the region. All admitted students receive full funding fellowships.

universities.name: King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals (KFUPM)
universities.description: A top-ranked public university highly prestigious and renowned for its cutting-edge programs in science, petroleum engineering, and advanced computing fields.

universities.name: Qatar University
universities.description: The premier national institution of higher education in Qatar, delivering high-quality undergraduate and graduate programs across diverse fields of study.

universities.name: King Saud University
universities.description: A highly prestigious public university in Riyadh, celebrated for its rigorous medical, engineering, and humanities departments, ranking among the top institutions in the Arab world.

universities.name: Abu Dhabi University
universities.description: An internationally accredited multi-campus private university in the UAE, famous for its leading business, law, and engineering programs.

universities.name: King Khalid University
universities.description: A major public university in southwestern Saudi Arabia, offering comprehensive educational tracks in healthcare, technology, and Islamic studies.

universities.name: Lebanese American University
universities.description: A leading, independent American institution of higher education in Lebanon, renowned for its academic excellence, student-centeredness, and civic engagement.

universities.name: The British University in Dubai
universities.description: A premier research-led university in Dubai offering high-standard British-style higher education in collaboration with top UK Russell Group institutions.

universities.name: Prince Mohammad Bin Fahd University
universities.description: A rapidly growing, highly modern private university in Saudi Arabia's Eastern Province, designed to foster creative leadership and digital tech competencies.

programs.title: Coders HQ Junior Python Virtual Academy

perks.title: GitHub Student Developer Pack
perks.description: Free access to GitHub Pro, Canva Pro, JetBrains IDE licenses, Azure $100 credits, and 80+ elite developer tools for verified school students.

perks.title: Notion Student Personal Pro
perks.description: Unlock the complete Personal Pro plan (unlimited file uploads, version history, unlimited guests) 100% free with a school email or student card.

perks.title: Figma for Education
perks.description: Get the Professional Team Plan for free. Design, prototype, and collaborate in real time. Verifiable with student ID or school enrollment letter.

perks.title: Microsoft Office 365 Education
perks.description: Free Access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and 1TB OneDrive cloud storage. Requires a valid institutional student email ID.

perks.title: JetBrains Academic Subscription
perks.description: Free individual licenses for IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, WebStorm, PyCharm Professional, ReSharper, and other IDEs. Renew free yearly with school email.

perks.title: Autodesk Student Software Suite
perks.description: Get free 1-year educational access to Autodesk products including AutoCAD, Revit, Maya, and Fusion 360. Verifiable via student ID or enrollment.

perks.title: Apple Education Savings
perks.description: Save on a new Mac or iPad with Apple education pricing. Available to newly admitted and current UAE/Middle East university students and parents.

perks.title: Spotify Premium for Students
perks.description: Get premium music subscription with 50% discount. Play offline, on-demand, without any ads. Verifiable via SheerID (school portal authentication).

perks.title: Canva for Education
perks.description: 100% free premium templates, millions of photos, fonts, graphics, and video editing for students and educators with school credentials.
